package_manifest:
# AIL Package

name: refund-tool
version: 0.1.0
profile: AgentTool
entry: spec.ail-spec.md
features: tools, inputs, outputs, permissions, effects, failures, guarantees, traces, secrets
conformance: first-slice
requirements:
AIL-Requirements:
- The tool Refund customer payment lets an AI Agent request a refund for a customer payment.
- The AI Agent may request Refund customer payment only when the order exists, the payment was captured, and the refund amount is not greater than the captured amount.
- Refund customer payment needs order id: Text, refund amount: Money, reason: Text, and payment token: Secret<Text>.
- Refund customer payment produces refund id: Text.
- Refund customer payment can read the order, read the payment record, call PaymentProvider.refund, write a RefundLedger entry, and create a human review task when approval is required.
- Refund customer payment must not reveal the payment token and must not refund more than the captured amount.
- Refund customer payment requires permission requester may create refunds.
- Refund customer payment requires manager approval when the refund amount is over USD 500.
- Refund customer payment records trace event RefundCustomerPaymentRequested.
- Refund customer payment guarantees Refund amount is less than or equal to the captured amount, payment token is redacted from all agent-visible output, and every external call is represented in the audit trace.
- Failure ProviderRejected happens when PaymentProvider rejects the refund, records failure ProviderRejected, writes no successful RefundLedger entry, does not notify the customer automatically, creates a human review task, and the trace records RefundProviderRejected.
